name: Global SaaS platform transforms the world’s fitness industry with Stripe
companyName: Global SaaS platform transforms the world’s fitness industry with Stripe
sourceTitle: Global SaaS platform transforms the world’s fitness industry with Stripe
snippet: So Glofox has used Stripe Connect to build a white-labelled payments solution called Glofox Payments, to make it easier for gyms and fitness studios across the world to start accepting payments and provide their customers with a consistent, best-in-class experience, no matter if they’re hitting a yoga studio in LA or a CrossFit class in Sydney. If you’re setting up a new fitness studio, you don’t want to wait six weeks to start accepting payments, so Stripe’s speedy onboarding for Glofox’s new users is a key benefit, “this is especially important with our franchise customers, who can be set up to manage payments in just hours” says Anthony. As Anthony says, “if you’re a giant fitness franchising empire, each of your individual franchisees is a start-up in its own right, so our heritage of working with new disruptors is really helpful for the big guys too.” Stripe has the scale to support the fitness industry’s largest companies, and now works with Glofox in a partner capacity to bring those companies onto the Glofox and Stripe platforms.

name: 15 Membership Management Software Platforms [2026] - Outseta

sourceTitle: 15 Best Membership Management Software Platforms [2026] - Outseta
snippet: # 15 Best Membership Management Software Platforms [2026]. An in-depth comparison of the 15 best membership management software platforms for creators, course builders, associations, and SaaS startups. Choosing the right membership management software is overwhelming. You're faced with dozens of options, from simple billing tools to complex all-in-one platforms. We've reviewed 15 of the most popular membership platforms and organized them by who they're actually built for: **creators**, **course builders and communities**, **associations and clubs**, and **membership software for specific tech stacks**. The goal is simple: help you pick the right tool for your specific situation, not just the one with the best marketing. **Membership management software** handles the infrastructure of running a membership business: storing member data, collecting payments, controlling access to content, and communicating with members. * **CRM / Member Database:** A single place for all member data, including contact info, plan type, membership status (is the member up to date on their payments), and engagement history.

name: glofox.com
companyName: glofox.com
sourceTitle: Best Fitness Class Scheduling Software - Boutique Fitness and Gym Management Software - Glofox
snippet: # Best Fitness Class Scheduling Software for Gyms & Studios in 2026. ***TL;DR:*** *The best fitness class scheduling software handles your bookings and reduces no-shows so you can spend more time with members. Here’s how to choose the right platform, plus 10 top picks for 2026.*. In any growing fitness business, the burden of admin starts small: a double booking here, or a missed payment there. Fitness class scheduling software is built to take that weight off. It handles your bookings, waitlists, and reminders so you can focus on the member experience instead of spreadsheets. This post breaks down what to look for in fitness class scheduling software, 10 platforms worth evaluating, and how the right tool directly impacts retention. Fitness class scheduling software replaces the patchwork of spreadsheets and separate tools that most gym owners start with. Let’s take a look at some of the factors that go into choosing the best fitness class scheduling software for your needs.

name: What is Membership Management Software? (and Why Do You Need It)
companyName: What is Membership Management Software? (and Why Do You Need It)
sourceTitle: What is Membership Management Software? (and Why Do You Need It)
snippet: ### Association Management Software. Run your membership, events, and finances in one place — built for your size and industry. #### For Your Organization. What is Membership Management Software? Membership management software is a game-changer for associations, nonprofits, and organizations looking to streamline their operations and enhance the member experience. In this blog post, we’ll explore what membership management software is, why it’s essential for your organization, and how it can transform the way you engage with your members. Whether you’re welcoming new members, improving event engagement, or managing payments, this software is designed to simplify your processes and boost member satisfaction. At its core, membership management software is a digital platform designed to help organizations manage member information, automate administrative tasks, and improve engagement across the entire member life cycle. By bringing these tools together in one system, organizations gain a complete view of their members, making it easier to personalize outreach, track participation, and deliver a stronger overall member experience. ## How to Choose the Right Membership Management Software.

snippet: # Best Martial Arts Software 2026 | 8 Platforms Compared. Finding the right martial arts school software can save you hours every week and keep your school running smoothly. We compared 8 leading platforms on features, pricing, and ease of use, so you can make the right call for your school. Running a martial arts school involves a lot more than teaching classes. Between belt promotions, managing family accounts, student attendance, automated billing, and keeping parents in the loop, the admin side can quietly take over your week. Standard gym software often falls short on the martial arts-specific elements like belt tracking, family billing, and promotion management in particular. **Quick Answer**: Martial arts software is a platform that handles student management, belt/rank tracking, family billing, class scheduling, and automated payments for dojos and academies. The best option in 2026 depends on school size: 1club for free access up to 100 students with full belt tracking, Kicksite for martial arts-native simplicity, and Zen Planner for schools over 100 students.

As the students arrive, mats in hand, a client interrupts with a question: “Do I still have three sessions left on my pass?” The instructor doesn’t know offhand. This is the everyday reality of boutique fitness and wellness studios. Solopreneurs can build meaningful SaaS by filling the gap between the growing demand for wellness services and the outdated tools used to run them.
